title: New Life Origins
description: A large collection of Origins developed for the New Life SMP series.
body:
# THIS IS A DATA PACK, NOT A MOD! INSTALL THIS INTO YOUR WORLD'S DATA PACK FOLDER.

A group of three creators were commissioned to create nearly thirty new origins for New Life SMP. Now that the series has ended, we've gotten Smajor's permission to publish them all.

Due to quantity, the full list of powers will not be uploaded here. However, here's a brief summary:
- Animal Whisperer: You're especially proficient in handling animals, and naturally cause nearby crops to grow faster. Perfect for barns and farms!
- Archaeologist: You're pretty good at sifting through gravel to find some lost riches.
- Assassin: Exactly what it sounds like. Sneaky and deadly!
- Bad Guy: Great for some comical villainy. Going invisible, tossing around TNT, and pummeling anybody that thinks they can kill you.
- Balloon: Fragile and floaty.
- Butterfly: Tiny with Elytra. Flowers are your friend.
- Chillager: Drop ice on your enemies heads, and turn yourself into an indestructible icicle.
- Dark Fairy: Fly around, turn invisible, and blast foes with magic. Just be careful of the cold or sunlight.
- Ditto: Copy several types of mobs by interacting with them.
- Fluffy Friend: Great friends with the sheeple; gain buffs when near them, and become sad without them.
- Ghast: Fly around and blast your enemies with fire balls.
- Glitch: Your existence is unpredictable and chaotic. You and your foes are susceptible to random effects.
- Guinea Pig: Fairly social creatures that like to team up together!
- Hippogryph: Fly around and with your wings. Become the flying taxi you were always meant to be!
- Lightmancer: Harness power over light to fly and blast your foes. Just be wary of the dark.
- Mimic: Transform into a chest and cause chaos when your friends try to open you.
- Otter: Swim around and eat plenty of fish!
- The Phantom: Fade in and out of invisibility. Diet base Phantom.
- Sculk: Possess and infest other creatures, but you can only see what moves..
- Sniffling: A slow herbivore that can sniff out ores and eat flowers for various effects.
- Snow Golem: An arctic giant that thrives in cold environments. Probably puts rocks in their snowballs to slow people down.
- Star: A beacon of light. Illuminate the area around you and glide through the air.
- Sunshine Girl: A solar-powered friend with a green thumb and laser beams.
- Toy: Small and fast. Mobs find you indistinguishable from Buzz Lightyear while you're at full health.
- Transporter: Bend space to your will. Now you're thinking with portals!
- Trickster: Change size and warp around-- but stay away from the dark!
- Weeping Angel: Teleport and remain unseen.
- Woodland Being: A tall defender of the woods. Is Paul Bunyan a kaiju?
  
Do not expect us to update this, and please do not bother us about it.

This data pack requires [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins), [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui), [Extra Alchemy](https://modrinth.com/mod/extraalchemy), [eggolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/eggolib) and [Apugli](https://modrinth.com/mod/apugli).
